---
title: "The Scouring of the White Horse, or, The Long Vacation Ramble of a London Clerk"
---

## The Scouring of the White Horse, or, The Long Vacation Ramble of a London Clerk

**Author:** Thomas Hughes
**Date:** 1859
**Imprint:** Cambridge: Macmillan

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
